description: Hash-based deduplication to prevent re-ingest of already processed sources.

steps.action: SKIP_INGEST — Corrected copy exists with current hash → proceed to Step 2 (discussion)

contradiction_resolution_flow: Read manifest.json for source → compare hash_original with current file
If match → use existing corrected copy
If mismatch → flag as stale, proceed to ingest
_priority: Use corrected copy from manifest for contradiction detection. Hash mismatch = re-ingest required.
